creator: netman@dynaplex.net
text:
PyMaint is a REPLACEMENT for sysutils/maint - Please DELETE the port sysutils/maint as it will no longer be updated.  This is a system maintenance aid for FreeBSD, written mostly in Python and some csh.  It automates common tasks such as buidling the OS, kernel, updating ports and source trees, etc, and can run batch 'scripts' which are cronable.

How-To-Repeat: N/A
